project.name: Sitemap
project.description: Adrian Rosebrock RateMyTeachers.com Sitemap Generator The Sitemap Generator module takes two files as input: 1. The combined file of Organization/Person information. 2. The file of Rating information. The output of the Sitemap Generator (depending on which configurations were used to generate the sitemap dump), will be at most four files: 1. An output file for the Organizations. 2. An output file for the Persons. 3. An output file for the Ratings. 4. An output file for the Request page in between the Person and Rating page.
